nasb.text: Now the sons of Noah who came out of the ark were Shem and Ham and Japheth; and Ham was the father of Canaan.

esv.text: The sons of Noah who went forth from the ark were Shem, Ham, and Japheth. (Ham was the father of Canaan.)

cnv.text: 挪亞的兒子，從方舟裡出來的，就是閃、含、雅弗；含是迦南的父親。

ccb.text: 与挪亚一起出方舟的有他的儿子闪、含、雅弗。含是迦南的父亲。

csbs.text: 挪亚的儿子，从方舟出来的，就是闪、含、雅弗；含是迦南的父亲。
